projectDescription: The fastest, simplest window tiler for KDE Plasma 6+ with mouse-driven tiling and full layout customization.
keyFeatures: Mouse-driven window tiling with Grid and Overlay modes
Advanced auto-tiling with carousel and stacking layouts
Virtual desktop management with drag-and-drop support
Web-based layout editor with 20+ pre-defined layouts
Highly customizable with 20+ settings and keyboard shortcuts
Touch and stylus input support (including Wacom devices)
Center-in-tile feature for flexible window positioning
publicApiSurface: Grid Tiler - Quick popup grid for window placement
Overlay Tiler - Full-screen overlay for multi-tile spanning
Auto Tiler - Automatic window arrangement with multiple presets
Virtual Desktop Manager - Add, remove, and move between virtual desktops
Layout Editor - Web-based tool for creating custom tile layouts
Special Tiles - Fill, Split, Maximize, Minimize, Fullscreen, Keep Above/Below
